task_completion.description: The built-in 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded and used for the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Panel on the left shows the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset containing the 'Region' column (since the local file lacks it).

task_completion.description: A 100% Stacked Bar Chart visualization is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization canvas displays a 100% stacked bar chart, and/or the visualization type icon in the Grammar panel indicates '100% Stacked Bar'.

task_completion.description: Data fields are correctly mapped to the chart axes and color legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, 'Region' is placed in the Category (X-Axis) slot, 'Number of Orders' (or a row count metric) is in the Values (Y-Axis) slot, and 'Customer Segment' is in the Color slot.

task_completion.description: The chart title is set to 'Customer Mix by Region'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title displayed directly above the visualization on the canvas reads exactly 'Customer Mix by Region'.

task_completion.description: The workbook is saved with the name 'Segment_Mix_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top application header or the save dialog displays the workbook name as 'Segment_Mix_Analysis'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with panels, menus, and canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The visualization is genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears within the application's canvas area with native UI elements visible, not as a pasted static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) are used to write code or scripts to generate a mock chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a '100% Stacked Bar Chart' named 'Segment_Mix_Analysis' with the title 'Customer Mix by Region'. The chart must map 'Region' to the X-Axis, 'Customer Segment' to Color (Legend), and 'Number of Orders' to the Y-Axis. CRITICAL: The provided local 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset lacks a 'Region' column. The agent must use the built-in 'Sample Order Lines' dataset provided by Oracle Analytics Desktop to successfully complete the task.
